scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:ml"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:ml"
scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../ml-service && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup: npm install concurrently -g && npm run postinstall
